title: How to integrate WorkCanvas after setting up trial
excerpt: So we use Miro, but thought we should instead consider WorkCanvas by monday.com. I signed up for the free trial for WorkCanvas, but I can’t see anyway to integrate into our monday.com account. We have a Pro plan (not ent…

posts.author: julief (Julie F)
posts.cookedHtml: So we use Miro, but thought we should instead consider WorkCanvas by monday.com. I signed up for the free trial for WorkCanvas, but I can’t see anyway to integrate into our monday.com account. We have a Pro plan (not enterprise). What am I doing wrong? While I CAN integrate Miro, WorkCanvas does not show up anywhere in searches for integrations or apps. It just seems to be totally separate. Any tips? And, are there any benefits to using WorkCanvas instead of Miro? Will there be integrations to items or any reporting? If not, I’m not sure why I would move away from Miro.

posts.author: JohnSchnett (John Schnettgoecke)
posts.cookedHtml: FWIW, I’m also having a pretty awful experience trying to work with the Monday support team to get any clarity on this issue.
